room.caption: [DCSE] It was during the time of this map's creation, that achievements were fully coded in.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1840 newMapY=80 toRoom=rDCS_I image_xscale=6 newArrowPosX=44 y+=16
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=112 newMapY=128 toRoom=rDCS_L image_xscale=6 newArrowPosX=44 y+=16

type=0 sprite_index=sWarmasterA_Idle image_xscale=-1.25 image_yscale=1.25 image_speed=0.15
if global.gameProgress>=4780 {instance_destroy()}

type=0 sprite_index=sTempleRunes image_index=1 image_speed=0
runeCheck=string_char_at(global.gameDCS_Prog,2) if runeCheck!="9" {image_blend=c_dkgray}

type=0 sprite_index=sTempleRunes image_index=3 image_speed=0
runeCheck=string_char_at(global.gameDCS_Prog,4) if runeCheck!="9" {image_blend=c_dkgray}

type=0 sprite_index=sTempleRunes image_index=2 image_speed=0
runeCheck=string_char_at(global.gameDCS_Prog,3) if runeCheck!="9" {image_blend=c_dkgray}
